methods.description: Preparation of sequencing libraries using Illumina TruSeq Stranded mRNA kit and sequencing using Illumina NextSeq 500 to obtain paired-end reads.

steps.description: A total of 12 sequencing libraries were prepared using an Illumina R TruSeq Stranded mRNA kit.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare sequencing libraries using Illumina TruSeq Stranded mRNA kit

steps.description: The libraries were sequenced (2 × 75 bp) in one Illumina R NextSeq 500 H150 run.

methods.description: Quality trimming of reads, quality check, and mapping to reference gene sequences.

steps.description: The obtained paired-end reads were quality-trimmed by performing a sliding window trimming (settings 4:20) with Trimmomatic.
steps.searchable_summary: perform quality trimming on reads using Trimmomatic

steps.description: The quality of the remaining reads was checked with FastQC.
The reads were quasi-mapped to the nucleotide sequences of all S. robusta genes using Salmon.
steps.searchable_summary: quasi-map reads to reference genes using Salmon

methods.method_name: Gene Level Aggregation and Differential Expression Analysis
methods.description: Aggregation of transcript quantifications to gene level and differential expression analysis using EdgeR.

steps.description: The files containing the transcript quantifications generated by Salmon were imported and aggregated to the gene level using the tximport package for R.
steps.searchable_summary: aggregate transcript quantifications to gene level using tximport

steps.description: Differential expression analysis was performed using the R package EdgeR.
steps.searchable_summary: perform differential expression analysis using EdgeR

steps.description: Independent filtering was performed by removing genes with low overall counts [counts-per-million (CPM) < 1 in at least two samples] prior to the analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: filter genes with low counts before analysis

steps.description: Differences in sequencing depth and RNA population were corrected using a weighted trimmed mean of the log expression ratios (TMM) normalization.
Data exploration was performed with a multi-dimensional scaling (MDS) plot visualizing expression differences between samples for the top 500 genes.
steps.searchable_summary: create MDS plot for top 500 genes

steps.description: Negative binomial GLMs, as implemented in the EdgeR software, were used to model read counts for each gene as a function of treatment.
steps.searchable_summary: model read counts using negative binomial GLMs

steps.description: For differential expression analysis, three comparisons were defined and tested using likelihood ratio tests (LRT) against a log 2 fold change threshold of 1.
Based on the fold change threshold test, we consider a gene to be significant if its False Discovery Rate (FDR) adjusted p-value is below the 5% level.
steps.searchable_summary: identify significant genes based on FDR

steps.description: To derive a list of genes that are significantly differentially expressed (DE) in at least one treatment, we took the union of all significantly DE genes across the three treatments.
steps.searchable_summary: derive list of significantly DE genes across treatments
